title: agent cli
subtitle: terminal-first multi-agent cockpit — real Claude TUI front and center, thin file rail, tabs = projects
loop: cmux (native, real terminal panes, real inline VS Code) + a real cmux.json config. Fork or build fresh only if config genuinely fails — decided after trying it, not before. Zellij/Superconductor trials parked, see PARKED.md.

cards.title: Try cmux's real appearance config — IN PROGRESS
cards.summary: cmux.json sidebarAppearance.*/workspaceColors.* tokens (tint, corner radius, material, blend mode, tab colors) — verified real and shipped, not a fork requirement. Applying flow-app-shell + flow-navigation guidance: check workspaceColors.indicatorStyle beyond its .leftRail default (spec wants a filled active-state, not just a stripe), sidebar width against the 240-280px/56-72px-collapsed norm.
cards.done: Jason confirms it reads as 'clean and modern,' or names specifically what still doesn't.
cards.closes: decides R3 and the fork question

cards.title: Ship v0 cockpit config
cards.summary: A real, versioned cmux.json in this repo, once R4 lands. cmux itself is already installed — zero application code needed unless R4 fails.
cards.done: Fresh shell: cmux + this repo's cmux.json → cockpit with real project workspaces, agents running, surviving a restart.

cards.title: Worktree helper
cards.summary: One keystroke: new agent pane = git worktree add + claude launched inside it, named and disposable. The 'same repo, parallel tasks' half of the mixed workflow.
cards.done: From any project tab: new-worktree-agent in <5s; cleanup command removes worktree + branch.

cards.title: Zed stripped fallback config
cards.summary: Verified settings.json/keymap/tasks for Zed as window-per-project cockpit (no project tabs exist in Zed — top community request). Kept as documented fallback, not the main path.
cards.done: Config documented in docs/; applied in <1h if ever wanted.

cards.title: Tauri 2 native harness
cards.summary: The endgame — gated harder now: fires only if BOTH R4 (cmux's real config) AND a scoped cmux fork attempt fail, per DECISIONS.md. Weigh the fork's own named risks first (Sparkle auto-update silently overwriting local changes, multi-platform monorepo scope, Xcode/Zig/Rust toolchain fragility — docs/blind-audit-cmux-fork-decision-2026-07-07.html). Seed from hashmark's Tauri scaffold + Warp design spec (color algebra, fonts, 358 icons) if it ever fires.
cards.done: v0 scope written from the trials' logged frictions — not imagined features — before any code.
cards.closes: closes the gap no OSS app fills (native-light, real PTY, thin rail)

cards.title: Mine Superconductor bundle for UX patterns
cards.summary: Settings-key notes + screenshot (kept in resources/ — the actual binary was removed from git, see DECISIONS.md 2026-07-07: you can't mine UX patterns from a compiled binary, so committing it had no benefit). Only runs if R3 actually fires, not scheduled by default — was previously a guaranteed step regardless of trial outcome.

shipped.title: Editor-fidelity spike
shipped.summary: 1-2h test: hx sample.tsx next to the VSCode screenshot. Verdict: PASS — real tree-sitter syntax highlighting, line numbers, distinct enough for real editing. Superseded by cmux's real inline VS Code, but the verdict (TUI editors can look real) held up.

shipped.title: Zellij cockpit trial — parked before completion
shipped.summary: Real KDL config built (zellij/agent.kdl) and the spike passed, but Jason rejected the static-config interaction model directly before the week-long trial ran: 'this should work like vscode — you open, pick a folder.' Not a wasted build — config stays in the repo, cheap to revisit. See PARKED.md and DECISIONS.md.
shipped.done: Honestly: not completed. Parked on direct user feedback, not on trial results.

shipped.title: cmux found, verified in source, adopted
shipped.summary: Superconductor and hashmark evaluated and rejected first (closed source / missing file explorer + single-agent-view). cmux (manaflow-ai, GPL-3.0, native Swift+AppKit on libghostty) verified directly in source: real NSOpenPanel folder-picker, real inline VS Code via code serve-web, real multi-agent split panes.
shipped.done: Logged in DECISIONS.md with full evidence trail.

shipped.title: Blind-spot audit of the fork-cmux decision
shipped.summary: 16-framework audit of 'cmux is best to fork.' Found the verdict was reached on asymmetric evidence (source-verified cmux vs. web-searched alternatives). More importantly: caught and corrected a false claim — cmux's chrome IS config-themeable (sidebarAppearance.*/workspaceColors.* in cmux.json), verified firsthand against real source, not just relayed. Likely makes the fork question moot.

shipped.title: Research: OSS landscape + Zed verification
shipped.summary: July 2026 survey: every purpose-built Claude Code GUI reimplements the UI, is deprecated, closed, or Electron-heavy. Zed: no project tabs, terminals die on quit, git panel single-repo. Zellij+yazi delivers ~90% of the spec at zero build cost.
shipped.done: Findings drove the trial-first roadmap; rejected options documented with reasons.

shipped.title: Repo + roadmap board + interactive cockpit demo
shipped.summary: Private repo with rockmap vendored, this board, and an interactive HTML demo of the zellij cockpit experience. Note: the demo shipped before any real trial hours were logged — flagged in the 2026-07-07 blind-spot audit as the project's central risk; see ERRORS.md.

shipped.title: Audit remediation
shipped.summary: Scaffolded PRD/ROADMAP/DECISIONS/PARKED/ERRORS. Installed zellij, yazi, helix (Ghostty already present) and built the editor-fidelity spike (spike/). Sequenced R1/R2, named the R3 threshold, re-gated S2. Removed the 117MB Superconductor binary from git (kept 548K of notes/icon). Pruned an orphaned worktree in indx; flagged its branch ambiguity for Jason instead of guessing.
shipped.done: All 16 audit findings addressed or explicitly deferred with a named owner (Jason, for the one judgment call).
